smg.text: Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. One or two showers later. Force 2 to 4 west to southwesterly winds.
Very hot. Fine apart from cloudy periods. A few thundery showers later. Force 3 to 4 west to northwesterly winds, becoming southwesterlies with gusts.
Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. One or two showers later. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
